headline: Why UNH Stock Breakout Faltered After Massive Earnings Beat
summary: UnitedHealth Group crushed Q2 earnings forecasts amid lower-than-expected benefit costs, sending the Dow Jones stock surging past a buy point on Thursday morning.  Rival managed-care providers including Humana, Centene and Elevance Health got a sizable lift from the initial warm reception for UnitedHealth's earnings report.  Results: UnitedHealth posted Q2 earnings per share of $6.38, up 56% from a weak year-earlier result and 30% ahead of $4.91 forecasts.

Results: UnitedHealth posted Q2 earnings per share of $6.38, up 56% from a weak year-earlier result and 30% ahead of $4.91 forecasts.

headline: UnitedHealth stock jumps on Q2 earnings, raises full-year outlook
summary: Insurance giant UnitedHealth Group (UNH) is out with its second quarter earnings on Thursday, raising its full-year outlook alongside its reported $112 billion in quarterly revenue. The stock has jumped in Thursday trading. Mizuho Americas healthcare equity strategist Jared Holz takes a closer look at the insurer's stock performance and the role Medicare Advantage had in its figures.

headline: Elevance Health (ELV) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift As Analysts Turn More Constructive
summary: Bernstein SocGen Group lifted its Elevance Health price target to US$482 from US$424, putting fresh attention on how analysts are reassessing the stock. Many research firms are sounding more constructive, pointing to steadier medical cost trends, support from Healthcare Services earnings, and a calmer policy backdrop, while still highlighting Medicaid and specialty drug costs as key risks. Read on to see what is driving this evolving analyst narrative and how you can keep track of the moving...

headline: Elevance Health (ELV) Beats Q2 And Raises Outlook While Leaving More Medicaid Markets
summary: Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) reported second quarter results that exceeded internal expectations. The company raised its full year guidance following the quarterly update. Management outlined plans to exit additional underperforming Medicaid markets. Elevance Health highlighted a focus on expanding Medicare Advantage and Carelon health services. Elevance Health is one of the largest U.S. managed care companies, with a broad footprint across commercial, Medicaid, Medicare Advantage, and health...
